designSystem.style: Dark-first mobile app with warm orange primary accent, clean card-based layouts, and soft gradient backgrounds. Uses rounded corners, clear hierarchy, and micro-interactions to feel friendly and approachable for food and cooking contexts.

screens: Scan — Camera/barcode scan interface with AI detection, quick-add pills, urgency alert, and pantry shortcut
Pantry — Ingredient list with freshness indicators, category filters, stats row, and urgency sorting
Recipes — AI-matched recipe cards with smart constraint filters, ingredient pills, urgency tags, and waste savings
Recipe Detail — Cooking timeline with step-by-step interactive mode, ingredient list, meta cards, and done state
Tracker — Weekly savings bar chart, CO2/meal/streak stats, ingredient rescue list, and settings with theme toggle
